text: mickey rourke hunt diane lane in elmore leonard s killshot it is not like mickey rourke ever really disappeared he ha had a steady string of appearance before he burst back on the scene he wa memorable in domino sin city man on fire once upon a time in mexico and get carter but in his powerful dramatic performance in the wrestler 2008 we see a full blown presentation of the character only hinted at in get carter whenever we get to know him rourke remains a cool but sleazy muscle bound slim ball this is an elmore leonard story and production leonard wrote such notable movie a taunt western thriller 3 10 to yuma be cool jackie brown get shorty 52 pick up and joe kidd this mean that we get tough guy some good some not so good it also mean we get tight realistic plot with character doing what is best for them in each situation weaving complication into violent conclusion killshot is no different tough slim ball killer rourke stalk unhappily married witness lane think history of violence meet no country for old men it is not a intense bloody or gory a those two but it is almost a good if you like those two including david croneberg s equally wonderful eastern promise you will like killshot also director john madden ha not done a lot of movie his last few were enjoyable if not successful proof captain corelli s mandolin and shakespeare in love diana lane ha not had a powerful movie role since she and richard gere gave incredible performance in unfaithful lately she is charming and appealing in romantic story such a night in rodanthe must love dog and under the tuscan sun here she is right on mark balancing her sexy appeal with reserved tension this is a small part for rosario dawson yet dawson doe a good job with it you see a lot more of lane including an underwear scene to rival sigourney weaver in alien and nicole kidman in eye wide shut while you are in the crime drama section also pick up kiss kiss bang bang and gone baby gone and before the devil know your dead the last ha wonderful performance by phillip seymour hoffman ethan hawke marisa tomei and albert finney killshot flopped at the box office more is our luck it is certainly worth a 3 4 dollar rental if you like this genre 6 20 2009

spoiler ahead it is really unfortunate that a movie so well produced turn out to be such a disappointment i thought this wa full of silly clich s and that it basically tried to hard to the american guy out there how many of you spend your time jumping on your girlfriend s bed and making monkey sound to the married girl how many of you have suddenly gone from prude to nympho overnight but not with your husband to the french would you really ask about someone being la fac when you know they do not speak french would not you use a more common word like universit i lived in france for a while and i sort of do know and understand europe and i love it but my german roommate and i found this pretty insulting overall it looked like a movie funded by the european parliament and it tried too hard basically it had all sort of difference that it tried to tie together not a bad thing in itself but the result is at best awkward but in fact ridiculous too many clash that would not really happen then the end of the movie the last 10 minute ruined all the rest why doe not xavier talk to the erasmus student he meet back in paris why doe he just walk off why doe he just run away from his job is that freedom and in the end is the new europe supposed to rest on a bunch of people who smoke up and shag all day is this what it s made up of besides the acting wa pretty horrible i cannot believe judith godr che s role and acting why wa she made to look like emanuelle b art so much at first i thought xavier wa ok but with retrospect i think he wa pretty bad and that s all really too bad because technically opening credit scene when he s asking what paper he need it wa really good except for sound editing around the british sibling and the soundtrack wa great too so the form wa good but the content pretty horrible

based on the comment made so far everyone seems to either hate this movie or love it i think it would be fair to point out that although this is not a great movie it ha it interesting moment for one thing it wa filmed on location in colorado wa it breckinridge or telluride i cannot remember but it is in the credit the location is absolutely stunning and spectacular it s beautiful even to me who lived in colorado for several year next it ha disney s penchant for wonderful character actor harry morgan ha never been in better form than when he play in a disney movie he is literally hysterical also remember the wonderful mary wickes although she ha a bit part in this movie she is great a always if you do not know who she is think of the animated disney version of hunchback from notre dame she wa one of the gargoyle and she wa also the most interesting nun in sister act a well a the best nun in the trouble with angel she ha always been a great character actress and most character actor never receive the recognition they deserve in addition to character actor and all star cast in the 1960s 1970s disney may have not had the greatest movie but if you really watch some of them from beginning to end you will notice that every movie ha some really funny or hysterical moment in it the entire movie may not be funny but there is always a comic gem at least 1 or 2 in every single live action movie disney ever made whether it s harry morgan in one of his bellowing tone of voice or tim conway floundering around or joe flynn giving one of his priceless look of horror it is all good the whole film may not be good but there are always hysterical moment in every disney film from this period that i have ever seen disney in this time period always managed to make a person smile despite the dumbness of the film bsed on these comment i disagree with viewer who say every disney movie in this time period is awful that statement it not quite accurate rather it is easier for me to give credit to the funny moment and overlook the weakness in the plot some live action disney movie are true classic old yeller bedknobs and broomstick mary poppins but for those that are not i am able to appreciate them for what they were good clean family fun in a time when movie had become vulgar crude and offensive

this wa laurel and hardy s last silent film for roach studio however since the public had a real thirst for talkie this same short wa re made by the team just a few year later with only a few small plot change laughing gravy wa essentially the same plot except that stan and ollie were trying to hide a cute puppy from their grouchy landlord not a goat like in angora love this whole goat angle is the worst part of the film while you could understand the boy wanting to keep a cute little dog after all it is snowy outside why exactly they bring a goat home is just contrived and pointless according to the plot the goat followed them home and so they got tired of shooing it away and kept it huh this just doe not make any sense if it had been a giraffe or a cow would they have done the same thing apart from being an unconvincing plot the movie itself is pure laurel and hardy with a familiar plot and familiar role for the comedian this film feature quite a few laugh but unfortunately is not one of their better film to wrap up their silent career this aspect of their career just seems to have ended with a whimper

ameet sherri for an evening of pleasure and terror cheap special effect cheesy line yep it the original 1978 movie nurse sherri starting geoffrey land a peter desmond and jill jacobson a sherri martin and directed by al adamson the movie is about an evil ancient spirit that possesses a nurse at a hospital then she start killing doctor one by one the acting wa okay but some of the acting wa robotic the storyline wa good but the sex scene were just thrown in there probably to get more view the directing wa bad and the special effect looked like a drawing the effect did not fool anybody the death scene were pretty good but the director mixed too many thing in there that did not make any sense like the sex scene the nudity the football player and many more overall it a good movie but not the best 7 out of 10

in all honesty i have not seen this film for many year but the few time i have tend to make part of it stick in my memory a anyone who ha seen it will understand i first saw it a a child at a ymca halloween party in the early sixty and it scared the hell out of u kid in a fun way i remember feeling genuine anxiety about the unknown thing lurking in the maze i cannot risk giving away the ending except to say that it wa surprising to say the least i remember vaguely the entire audience of young boy letting out a big scared holler followed by laughter when the terrible secret wa revealed the ending ha been seen by most viewer a one of the greatest unintentionally funny climax to a movie in film history and yet oddly moving in a way you have to see it for yourself which is not easy these day i do not know if it s available on home video or not but it would still make a great halloween feature for both kid and adult

i enjoyed the beautiful scenery in this movie the first time i saw it when i wa 9 dunderklumpen is kind of cute for kiddy in a corny way it reminded me of hrpuffinstuff on sat morning it swedish backdrop make it easy on the eye do not expect older kid to be interested a the live action animation is way behind the time and most older kid will get bored this is definitely an under 10 age set movie and a nice bit of memory for those of u who were little kid in 1974

haggard the movie is the real life story of ryan dunn and his girlfriend who cheated on him also with the help from his two friend 1 a skate boarder who life for nothing and 2 a trying to be funny scientist which doe not really work played by bam margera and brandom dicamillo the film haggard the movie also ha a lot of the character from jackass etc but to say it wa written by bam margera and co this is a very weak attempt seems to me like it wa written when he wa bored or a a project with they did not pay a lot of attention to the film also star bam s girlfriend jennifer rivell who play glauren ryan s girlfriend who basically cheated on him again very bad acting by jennifer another actor that some people may be interested in is steve a k a hellboy played by rakeyohn which his character doe not seem to be with the story again bad acting also this character doe not really have a lot of line in this film which basically make it very boring but worst of all is raab s character the voice sound like a smoker who basically ha throat cancer also i think he could have been improved overall i think the character in this film are not with the story like in one scene it would be on one certain character a minute later a different scene different character to say that this is supposed to be a film sort of a documentary it not played by the character a a documentary the acting make you think that it a cheap attempt at making a film with your spare time towards the middle of the film we start to lose focus on the main character ryan dunn although a lot of the attention is on bam and brandon in conclusion this film is ok if you laugh at thing that are not very funny stupid stunt terrible acting and the occasional nude scene also i think there there are too many scene of just no talking and just music 7 10

simon west pg 13 thriller about a babysitter who get disturbing prank call while sitting at a mansion is neither original nor exciting enough to be called a good film although there are some element of suspense good eye candy and decent character the film is just another i know what you did last summer a it fall short of being taken seriously the performance were alright but nothing special with this flick i say skip it unless you are looking for a mediocre movie you can find better film than this on lifetime sometimes okay maybe not lifetime but at least usa or somethin haha 7 10

actually i will admit i am a political junkie so this resonated with me but the erratic nature of m green yes i know what they did to her but the ending wa such a copout and totally inconsistent with the film itself why cannot barry l and crew just left u wondering what he wa going to do let u debate it instead they have this oh i am not worthy bullshit ending and it just show that when the chip were down it s better to leave the table instead of doubling down stop the disney ending and putting a bow on it life is not easy they should have had the courage to give the main character some backbone we had to listen to the rhetoric the entire movie and then it turned sniveling and the stupid inane behavior by m green when the crap wa out of her system just made for a ridiculous near end of the movie that wa icing on the cake

ernest save christmas is comedian ernest s christmas special film in this film ernest ha to find a successor to santa claus in order for christmas to continue along the way he meet a young girl who is a thief and who end up stealing something very important of santa s i will not tell you what that is you will just have to watch the film for yourself like most ernest film there is a lot of slapstick humor involved this film is probably one of ernest s best film it s funny and it ha some important lesson to learn regarding friendship and family and not being afraid to show love it s not the best christmas film around but it is a good one to get you in the christmas spirit it s a little bit sad that the film is a little dated now

comanche moon had everything going for it for starter simon wincer s back a man who s name is synonymous with high quality tv western unfortunately the problem with moon are something even the most talented director could not solve a poor script based on a lackluster novel forget historical accuracy a any reader of the novel can tell you the biggest travesty in moon is that it s not even consistent with information from the original lonesome dove masterpiece so many wonderful rich moment in the miniseries and to an even greater degree the book are completely missing in moon considering the fact that most viewer of moon are probably coming with at least some sort of dove background the lack of character driven and emotional backstory is downright painful that said moon is one instance where the adapted version could and should have been altered to make it more suitable for the screen for example the novel moon focus largely on the comanche themselves to it credit the miniseries try to service the comanche but in the end it give them just enough that the viewer just get a sense they are missing out on some important part of the story similarly val kilmer s scull loses out here too the role should have either been expanded so kilmer and rachel griffith for that matter actually had something to do or the role should have just been reduced to smaller supporting part instead kilmer get top billing for a character that just leaf you scratching your head after his appearance in the completely bizarre final act there s strange moment throughout the film that just make no sense to those who have not read the book a killer parrot what further there is not a single scene that show u that call and mccrae are anything near the amazing texas ranger they claim to be not a single one of their expedition in moon or dead man s walk for that matter end successfully and call and mccrae just seem to blunder their way through one pointless mission after another frankly larry mcmurtry should never have been given the job of writing the script and only did so because of the praise surrounding that other cowboy movie brokeback mountain mcmurtry can write good novel although there s some dissension over the consistency of that statement but he s never exactly established himself a a scriptwriter this production would have benefited from not only bringing back director wincer but original screenwriter bill wittcliff to adapt the novel to screen witcliff doe not exactly have a mountainload of material to his screen writing credit but no one can deny he did a fantastic job at whittling down the original lonesome dove with all this said comanche moon is almost a brilliant production aided by a terrific cast that unfortunately just are not given enough to do steve zahn s portrayal of gu mccrae or rather his portrayal of robert duvall a gu mccrae is dead on and while some have criticized karl urban a woodrow call saying his performance doe not imitate the quiet stoic woodrow of the original movie all i can say is blame mcmurtry because mcmurtry is the one who both in the moon novel and now the miniseries turned woodrow from socially inept awkward but natural leader into some emotionless character whose line are just dull and whose character motivation are only clear if you have seen them portrayed far more adequately in the sequel still it s the cast that sparkle in moon to the degree that i left the miniseries with that same feeling of melancholy i felt watching the original lonesome dove this time because i realized it s probably the last time we will see these character appear on screen for a long long time to come and quite honestly this cast could have done so well in a well nurtured full blown network tv series all in all aside from wasted opportunity with the cast the biggest travesty is that the original lonesome dove novel contained so much rich backstory for the character that would have been fascinating utterly fascinating to see translated on screen unfortunately all that ha been tossed aside in favor of mcmurtry s tedious inconsistent and ultimately irrelevant prequel

when the movie first started i thought cheesy the first ten minute were really boring after the slow beginning and some of the soap opera antic i started liking it the plot wa different than anything i had ever seen now wa it a horror not really it should not have been classied a a horror or the producer should have put more money into the movie to make it scary a it wa the creature where only there for a short time i can only assume this wa for money reason the good side wa that the movie wa very entertaining it held my interest after the start and did make me wonder about creature from another dimension it wa obvious that this wa a first time movie for the director but there were a couple of highlight by the end i wa hooked too bad hollywood did not put more money behind this

right here we go you have probably read in previous review on this film that it is awful badly acted avoid at all cost well i suppose in some way this is true it is fair to say that you could not write a spoiler in this comment a there is no plot to spoil however there is a fine line between plain awful and absolutely hilarious and believe me this film is the latter the acting is so bad the plot so non existent and the ending so completely baffling it will have you laughing the whole way through there are scene in this film that take comedy to a new level do not expect an oscar winner but believe me for the small price you will pay for this disaster it is worth every penny

another direct to video movie from disney that is essentially perfect for the kid the problem with kronk s new groove i find is that everything that made the first movie a fun great ride is replaced with a more sad and sombre film in this movie kronk learns a great deal of lesson at many others expense it take away much time that could be spent at creating a more enjoyable film kronk s new groove deal with two story yzma return for payback and one m birdwell hope to defeat kronk s camp counseling championship this all lead up to kronk confronting his father and his disapproval over his son s direction in life from lord of the ring to michael jackson s thriller kronk s new groove recycles every bit of time that it allows to entertain it viewer if you loved the original or are looking forward to the upcoming tv series about kuzco i recommend kronk to his loyal fan

in the aftermath of september 11th in new york this drama about american firefighter wa conceived a a salute and tribute to their professionalism the story is told with a series of flashback where after firefighter jack morrison joaquin phoenix ha crashed through the floor of a burning building and only communicating with captain mike kennedy john travolta via the radio the flashback basically show how jack grows from being a recruit seeing kennedy a a father figure to being a firehouse legend of course in the present day jack s fellow firefighter are trying to reach him but they are too late and in the end he let them leave him and it forward to his funeral where he is praised a one of the best firefighter they have known also starring jacinda barrett a linda morrison terminator 2 s robert patrick a lenny richter morris chestnut a tommy drake billy burke a dennis gauquin balthazar getty a ray gauquin and tim guinee a tony corrigan the blaze of the film are ultimately all i could pay attention to and enjoy seeing the character tackle them the rest is a bit too chatty for my liking adequate

mile o keeffe once again assumes the role of the mighty ator in this the first sequel to the original film what can i say this pretty much represents b movie nirvana the plot is ludicrous the script is terrible the acting is hammy throughout the special effect well let s not even go there all in all this movie is a veritable delight highlight of the film include ator and thong his mute companion not his undergarment being attacked by invisible assailant in a cave certainly saved on the fx budget there ator battling what ha to be the most unconvincing giant snake ever committed to celluloid and of course the infamous hangliding scene there s one question i have though at the end of the movie we see a huge atomic explosion when ator supposedly destroys the geometric nucleus a the narrator tell u how in the hell did ator destroy it and manage get out alive did he fashion some form of primitive timer detonator or something oh well such an illogical ending really only add to the movie overall charm they just do not make them like this anymore

while this is not an all time classic comedy it is a pretty good little movie to watch if you catch it on a rainy saturday morning with not a lot else going on right then harold lloyd play ezekiel cobb an american coming home after growing up in china where his dad wa a missionary he ha come home from china to find an american wife and plan to return to china to continue his father s work cobb unwittingly is recruited to run for mayor of his corrupt home town when the existing political machine that control the town realizes that he would make a perfect patsy to run against the current mayor who also is the head of the town s underworld they figure the bumbling stumbling cobb ha no chance to win and therefore the current mayor continues to run the town and run his scheme which make them all rich lloyd is not doing the physical comedy here like he did in his silent film he doe a convincing portrayal of cobb with a reserved understated dignity the acting wa good from all involved and the story and script were also quite good being made in 1934 the film doe have some rather racist language when talking about the chinese and it also ha a typical black character from that era but these stereotype are not nearly a mean a i have seen from other film from that time although not close to being lloyd s best film this movie doe entertain and lloyd is very good a cobb you will not be blown away by this film but it may be enough to peak your interest in lloyd and make you want to see more of his work

i cannot believe i missed this one made in 1970 with a budget that would probably allow you to make one indifferent episode of a tv soap this is 90 minute of sustained sharp a a knife film making you will find the outline plot etc elsewhere on this site consider though that the whole thing wa shot using a single hand held 16mm camera all the dialogue is improvised none of the actor had appeared in front of a camera before it sound like a recipe for disaster instead what we get is hippy v cop running around in the california desert in what evolves into a that s not fair i am on that person s side scenario the only problem is the director keep making you shift your allegiance and at the end of 90 minute we are still not sure who ha one brilliant quite brilliant
